lines.speaker: Cap'n Hand
lines.text: Arrr, it be a sad tale. I used to sail the seven seas, a-lootin' and a-plunderin' whatever took my fancy.

lines.speaker: Cap'n Hand
lines.text: Then I got a conscience, so I stopped being a pirate, and travelled the world giving back some of the loot I'd taken.

lines.speaker: Cap'n Hand
lines.text: Seems people didn't appreciate me interruptin' their business to give 'em free stuff, so now I'm locked up for harassment.

lines.speaker: Cap'n Hand
lines.text: Nothing, eh? Nothing be all I got, anyway.
